'''Tof''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tof system/Legends|Tof system]] of the [[Firefist]] satellite [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] on the peripheral halo of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic disk]] and was part of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[near-Human]] [[Tof/Legends|Tofs]], a green-skinned race of space pirates.

==Description==
Tof was a [[Water/Legends|water]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Firefist]], a satellite [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] in the peripheral halo of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Its oceans were inhabited by titanic predators and its island chains were the site of artificial ports.<ref name="TUR" />

{{Planet-stub}}
